'''âk-g-j-f''' ('''kakagjefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:eject|eject]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-g-j-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eject|eject]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-g-j-f
|-
! Lemma
| kakagjefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikagjefoko|thikagjefoko]] || [[word:jikagjefoko|jikagjefoko]] || [[word:shikagjefoko|shikagjefoko]] || [[word:kikagjefoko|kikagjefoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokagjefoko|thokagjefoko]] || [[word:jokagjefoko|jokagjefoko]] || [[word:shokagjefoko|shokagjefoko]] || [[word:kokagjefoko|kokagjefoko]]
|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
